raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle the frame","name":"Before we get specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?","description":"Lets Maria set the agenda and surface the thread she most wants to work on.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Current ground","name":"What's feeling most solid in your role right now?","description":"Surfaces what is working today so the conversation starts from real context, not deficit.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision readout","name":"What did you take from last cycle's decision?","description":"Checks whether she got a concrete interpretation of the pass-over and what meaning she made of it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next chapter","name":"Where do you want your Principal scope to be taking you next?","description":"Gets her to name the kind of broader impact or scope she wants, beyond a generic growth answer.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring role","name":"What role do you want mentoring to play in your growth right now?","description":"Distinguishes mentoring as a strategic lever from mentoring as a place to park effort.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Strategic edge","name":"What kind of work would most strengthen your case for the next step?","description":"Forces a concrete view of which experiences would actually move her trajectory.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Missing evidence","name":"What evidence do you feel is still missing for the path you want?","description":"Surfaces whether she lacks a readout, a sponsor signal, or a clearer benchmark.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What would you want more of from me to make the next stretch feel worth it?","description":"Elicits the kind of manager support that would help her re-engage and move forward.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff check","name":"What would you be willing to drop to make room for the growth work you want?","description":"Makes the cost of growth explicit and tests whether her current investments are aligned.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Close the loop","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to act on before we meet again?","description":"Ends with one concrete next move and keeps the conversation anchored in commitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
